name: agent-skills-rayslava
description: Agent skills for pi, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and any harness that consumes the standard Agent Skills layout

plugins.name: rust-dev
plugins.description: Rust development conventions and mandatory post-change pipeline (clippy / fix / fmt / test). Auto-loads on any Rust signal.

plugins.name: github-pr
plugins.description: Read GitHub Pull Requests and render them as clean markdown via the gh CLI (gh + jq, no Python). Auto-loads on any PR / pull-request signal.
